query: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].transactionCounter') as tc0, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[1].transactionCounter') as tc1 FROM espn_season_cache WHERE viewName = 'combined' AND season = 2026 ORDER BY fetchedAt DESC LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yMVuFXFfyKno5zd.8bace71a6706 --database D7EDTbt5uXwnUBkJHewERh --execute SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].transactionCounter') as tc0, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[1].transactionCounter') as tc1 FROM espn_season_cache WHERE viewName = 'combined' AND season = 2026 ORDER BY fetchedAt DESC LIMIT 1
